query.label: Latest rubric diff (inline demo data)
query.sql: SELECT '{"role":"AI Engineer","role_key":"ai-engineer","versions":{"previous":"v3","current":"v4"},"feedback_count":3,"window":"Last 14 days · 9 candidates re-scored.","traits":[{"name":"hard_things_done","old":0.2,"new":0.27},{"name":"open_source_contributions","old":0.1,"new":0.14},{"name":"company_signals","old":0.1,"new":0.12},{"name":"skills","old":0.1,"new":0.1},{"name":"hackathons","old":0.1,"new":0.08},{"name":"schools","old":0.1,"new":0.07},{"name":"years_of_experience","old":0.1,"new":0.08},{"name":"education_level","old":0.1,"new":0.07},{"name":"company_stages","old":0.1,"new":0.07}],"rubric_diff":[{"op":"context","text":"Score AI Engineer candidates on the following signals:"},{"op":"context","text":""},{"op":"context","text":"- hard_things_done: shipped systems with real users, ambiguity resolved"},{"op":"add","text":"  · weight raised — interviewers consistently flagged scaling stories as predictive"},{"op":"add","text":"  · prefer concrete metrics (latency, RPS, cost) over adjectives"},{"op":"context","text":"- open_source_contributions: meaningful PRs to projects > 1k stars"},{"op":"modify","text":"  · counter-pattern: drive-by docs PRs do NOT count (added after Nathan eval)"},{"op":"context","text":"- schools"},{"op":"remove","text":"  · Tier-1 school = +1 to rating (over-indexed; 4 false positives in Q1)"},{"op":"add","text":"  · de-emphasized — school is a weak signal vs hard_things_done"},{"op":"context","text":"- hackathons: weight reduced — does not predict on-the-job execution"},{"op":"add","text":"- emotion / between-the-lines: extract hesitation in scaling questions"}],"triggers":[{"who":"Steven C.","what":"rejected after onsite — ''great hackathons but no production scaling''","when":"Apr 26"},{"who":"Sergey","what":"marked Nathan 6.5 (was AI-scored 8.0) — drive-by OSS contributions","when":"Apr 24"},{"who":"Fred","what":"added counter-pattern: ''tier-1 school ≠ shipped under load''","when":"Apr 22"}]}' AS payload
